author: y4rr
content: Result: Phase C.3 DataLoader iteration parity vs torch.utils.data delivered. 5/5 configs PASS. Pinned ferrotorch/dataloader-batches-v1 (bundle SHA c6a9f938f27f174b3fc74bd26f6083464c6bf37e3d4ab7ddaa0109c62bd15ce7, repo SHA 170d0412ab3e). Equality modes: ORDER for sequential/sequential_droplast/batch_size_3, SET for shuffled_seeded, SUBSET for shuffled_droplast (drop_last+shuffle drops different items per PRNG, so SUBSET-validity against full 10-item ground truth replaces SET-equality). Files: scripts/pin_pretrained_dataloader_batches.py, scripts/verify_dataloader_inference.py, ferrotorch-data/examples/dataloader_iterate_dump.rs, ferrotorch-data/tests/conformance_dataloader_iteration.rs, registry pin in ferrotorch-hub/src/registry.rs. Cargo test wrapper PASS. ferrotorch-data --lib 162 tests PASS (unchanged). ferrotorch-vision --lib 452 PASS (unchanged). workspace build clean. clippy clean.
